metadata.description: Multi-stack design-spec-driven workflow skills for Claude Code: stack-neutral Adapter Plan + Flutter and Next.js/Tailwind reference adapters; discovery, compose, sequence, ship, ralph autonomy loop; status/promote/atlas-save productivity helpers; 11 atomic theme/critique/refine/copy/mockup operators.

plugins.name: design-workflow
plugins.description: Full design-spec-driven pipeline — Júri discovery + critique, compose/sequence/ship orchestrators, ralph-loop 3-tier autonomy, productivity helpers (pause/resume/status/approve, status, promote, atlas-save), and 11 atomic operators (theme audit/create/extend/port, bolder/quieter/distill, motion, frontend-design, ux-writing).
